FrozenErrorz
    A frozen/immutable instance or attribute have been attempted to be
    modified.
    It mirrors the behavior of ``namedtuples`` by using the same error message
    and subclassing `AttributeError`.
    .. versionadded:: 20.1.0
    z
can't set attributeN)
__name__
__module__
__qualname__
__doc__
args
3/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/attr/exceptions.pyr
FrozenInstanceErrorz\
    A frozen instance has been attempted to be modified.
    .. versionadded:: 16.1.0
    N
FrozenAttributeErrorz]
    A frozen attribute has been attempted to be modified.
    .. versionadded:: 20.1.0
    Nr
AttrsAttributeNotFoundErrorzq
    An ``attrs`` function couldn't find an attribute that the user asked for.
    .. versionadded:: 16.2.0
    Nr
NotAnAttrsClassErrorzi
    A non-``attrs`` class has been passed into an ``attrs`` function.
    .. versionadded:: 16.2.0
    Nr
DefaultAlreadySetErrorz
    A default has been set using ``attr.ib()`` and is attempted to be reset
    using the decorator.
    .. versionadded:: 17.1.0
    Nr
UnannotatedAttributeErrorz~
    A class with ``auto_attribs=True`` has an ``attr.ib()`` without a type
    annotation.
    .. versionadded:: 17.3.0
    Nr
PythonTooOldErrorz~
    It was attempted to use an ``attrs`` feature that requires a newer Python
    version.
    .. versionadded:: 18.2.0
    Nr
NotCallableErrorz
    A ``attr.ib()`` requiring a callable has been set with a value
    that is not callable.
    .. versionadded:: 19.2.0
    c
super
	TypeError
__init__r
value)
selfr
	__class__r
NotCallableError.__init__c

__str__[

ValueErrorr

<module>
